title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 334.1630 - Fees for expedited licensure
text:
334.1630.  Fees for expedited licensure. — 1.  A member state issuing an expedited license authorizing the practice of medicine in that state may impose a fee for a license issued or renewed through the Compact.
  2.  The Interstate Commission is authorized to develop rules regarding fees for expedited licenses.
(L. 2023 S.B. 70 merged with S.B. 157)
